sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-07-04 17:13
- Distance: 9.5 km
- Moving time: 50:33
- Elapsed time: 51:27
- Elevation gain: 139.8 m
- Average heart rate: 172.9 bpm
- Max heart rate: 183 bpm
- Average watts: 222.5 W
- Average speed: 11.3 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `173.6 bpm`, ranging from `163.1` to `178.8 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `170.9 bpm` and second-half average HR was `176.3 bpm` (+5.4 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `175.2 spm`, with a working range of `157.4` to `181.4 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `174.8 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `175.5 spm` (+0.7 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:19 /km` across `9.514 km` in `50:33` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:00 /km` and second-half pace was `5:38 /km` (+38 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `172.9 bpm` average and `183 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `168.4 bpm` in the first half and `177.1 bpm` in the second (+8.7 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `50:33` out of `51:27` elapsed (98.3%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `8` stop segments and `0.8%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `157.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `2.4 m` and `68.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `53.0 m` in the first half and `104.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
